# Yeti Peptides

> UK-based research peptide supplier offering laboratory-grade compounds with worldwide shipping. Strictly for research use only.

Yeti Peptides supplies premium research-grade peptides — including GLP-1 compounds (Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, Retatrutide, Cagrilintide), healing peptides (BPC-157, TB-500), growth hormone secretagogues, and nootropics — with COA-verified purity, crypto payment options, and a separate UK Domestic catalog for faster in-region delivery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product highlights, brand overview, and Discord community.
- [Products](/products): Full research peptide catalog with International and UK Domestic stock.
- [Peptide Calculator](/calculator): Concentration and dose-volume calculator with visual syringe.
- [How to Pay (Crypto)](/how-to-pay-crypto): Step-by-step USDT/USDC and Middleman Escrow payment guide.
- [Track Order](/track-order): 17TRACK shipment lookup.
- [About Us](/about): Lab positioning, sourcing, and quality standards.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, Telegram, and Discord support channels.
- [Shipping & Returns](/shipping-returns): Delivery terms and refund policy.
- [Research Disclaimer](/research-disclaimer): Research-use-only legal notice.
